acknowledged: Owner decision 2026-07-10: no dedicated test Supabase project. Automated suites run against the production project with mandatory test_run_id tagging on every row and storage object, teardown after every cycle, and the residue check as a failing gate. This file is the explicit acknowledgment the fail-closed guard requires; deleting it (or provisioning .env.test, which always takes precedence) restores strict isolation.
